estimand.event: first public-authority lab-confirmed detected BDBV case in the target geography during the 30-day window
estimand.negative_policy: absence of public evidence is not sufficient when the target is surveillance-dark or evidence is missing; mark unscoreable
estimand.window_policy: inclusive 30-day window beginning on the UTC calendar day after freeze

scoring_policy.undefined_metric_policy: emit null with reason when no evaluated rows or no outcome class variation
scoring_policy.no_metric_shopping: round manifests freeze eligible metrics before outcomes
scoring_policy.common_target_policy: all eligible models are evaluated on the identical evaluable target subset from a complete frozen matrix
scoring_policy.uncertainty_policy: do not emit iid confidence intervals for one spatially correlated round; aggregate by round before clustered uncertainty

models.label: Base-rate probability benchmark
models.status_note: Needs reviewed pre-cutoff denominator and smoothing policy before activation.

models.label: LOVS heuristic corridor interval
models.status_note: Transparent heuristic interval; evaluated honestly when prospectively frozen, not described as fitted.

models.label: Distance-only frontier rank
models.status_note: Promote only after the generator owns the centroid and target-universe contract.

models.label: Mobility effective-distance rank
models.status_note: Labs result predicted next detections and did not beat distance/gravity; requires promotion review before production.

models.label: Operational response overlay
models.status_note: Descriptive UI overlay until migrated into generator-owned code; never duplicate the TypeScript formula in Python.

honesty_notes: This registry defines persistent competitors and benchmarks; it does not freeze a live prediction round by itself.
The July 5 to August 4 public commitment block remains a separate tier/direction accountability block, not a probability tournament.
Mobility effective distance remains research-only until explicitly promoted from labs.
